headline: JPMorgan Raises its Price Target on PG&E Corporation (PCG) to $24 from $21
summary: PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG) is one of the 8 Must-Buy Nuclear Energy Stocks to Invest In. On March 18, 2026, JPMorgan raised the price target on PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG) to $24 from $21 and maintained an Overweight rating after updating models across the North America utilities group. On March 9, 2026, UBS upgraded PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG) […]
